text:
Err, Indeed, selected the wrong one! Sorry!

Attached the correct one.

<cvs-src@yandex.ru> wrote:

>> Index: Makefile

>> +++ Makefile    (working copy)
>> @@ -3424,6 +3424,7 @@
>>       SUBDIR += py-dal
>>       SUBDIR += py-darcsver

>> +    SUBDIR += py-dateutil2
